top_signals.title: Meta is building a prediction markets app. These stocks fell in response
top_signals.summary: The report said that CEO Mark Zuckerberg directed staff to develop a prediction markets platform, internally known as "Arena."
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The Exploit Doesn't Exist. You Can Still Prove It Works Against You
top_signals.summary: Attackers can now weaponize newly disclosed vulnerabilities far faster than most organizations can patch them. Picus Security explains how security teams can validate exploitability before a public exploit even exists. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
